exceptions.rule: Off-brand visual pattern — non-MH palette colors
exceptions.detailPattern: Patriotic red-to-blue gradient border (red-600 → blue-700) wrapping WA DVA Veteran Owned Business certification logo
exceptions.reason: The WA DVA certification logo has a non-transparent background and requires a container. The patriotic red/blue color scheme is inseparable from the meaning and authenticity of the Veteran Owned certification. Exception is strictly scoped to WaVobBadge component only.
